landing.heroSubtitle: Smart Finn Track turns daily expense logging into clear, actionable insight — powered by AI, available in English and Bahasa Indonesia.
landing.feature1Body: Type what you spent on. We sort it into the right category — automatically, in any language.
landing.feature2Body: Monthly narrative reports and anomaly alerts so you actually know where your money goes.
landing.feature3Body: Full Bahasa Indonesia and English support — UI, AI responses, and reports all switch instantly.
landing.footer: Built as a portfolio project. Free forever.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your Smart Finn Track account
auth.name: Full name
auth.passwordHint: Use 8+ characters with a mix of letters & numbers
auth.benefit1: Free forever — no credit card required
auth.benefit2: AI-assisted from your very first transaction

onboarding.title: Choose your language
onboarding.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here's a snapshot of your month.
dashboard.anomalyBody: Your Entertainment spending is 42% higher than your 4-week average. Consider reviewing recent subscriptions.
dashboard.insightText: You're spending 18% more than last month. The biggest jump is in Entertainment (+42%). Your balance is still healthy — you can still save Rp 4.8M this month if the current pace holds.
dashboard.insightActionable: Want concrete suggestions to bring Entertainment down?

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: All your income and expenses.
transactions.noResultsSub: Add your first transaction to get started.

reports.title: Monthly reports
reports.subtitle: AI-written summaries of your finances each month.
reports.empty: Your first report will appear at the start of next month.
reports.sampleBody: In April, you spent Rp 2,340,000 — up 18% from March. The biggest jump was in Entertainment (+42%), likely due to 2 new subscriptions. For May, consider keeping your entertainment spending under Rp 400,000.
reports.olderBody: March was your steadiest month yet. Total spending of Rp 1,980,000 came in 6% below February. Food was your largest category at Rp 720,000. Keep that grocery momentum going.
reports.oldestBody: February spending hit Rp 2,108,000 — a slight 3% rise over January. Transportation saw the biggest delta (+22%), driven by weekend trips. Plan ahead for travel in March.

chat.title: Chat advisor
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about your finances. The AI knows your data.
chat.emptyTitle: Ask me anything about your finances
chat.emptySubtitle: Try one of these to get started.
chat.suggest1: How much did I spend on food this month?
chat.suggest2: Which category was my biggest expense last 3 months?
chat.suggest3: How can I save Rp 500,000 next month?
chat.mockReply: Based on your last 30 days, you spent Rp 820,000 on Food — about 23% of your total expenses. That's roughly Rp 27,000 per day, which is in line with the previous month.
chat.errorReply: Sorry, I couldn't process your request. Please try again.
chat.quotaError: AI daily limit reached (20 requests/day on free tier). The quota resets at midnight. Please try again later.
chat.greetingHeading: How can I help you today?
chat.greetingSubtitle: I have access to your transactions for the past 90 days.
chat.greetingCta: Try one of these to begin:
chat.promptBiggestQuestion: Which category was my biggest expense over the last 3 months?
chat.promptSaveQuestion: How can I save Rp 500,000 next month?
chat.promptFoodQuestion: How much did I spend on food this month?
chat.promptSubsQuestion: Are there any new subscriptions this month?
chat.promptCompareQuestion: Compare my April and May spending.
chat.promptTargetQuestion: Is a Rp 2 million monthly savings target realistic for me?
chat.privacyLine1: Your data is not retained by the model.
chat.privacyLine2: Each conversation is sandboxed by session.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and preferences.
settings.accentDesc: Choose the primary color for the interface.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language for the interface and AI responses.
settings.anomalyAlertsDesc: Get notified when unusual spending is detected.
settings.monthlyReportDesc: Receive an AI-generated report at the start of each month.
settings.deleteDataDesc: Permanently delete all your transactions and reports.
settings.logoutDesc: Sign out of your account on this device.

sidebar.aiTip: Save Rp 200K this month by cutting 2 subscriptions.
